5.anchor: Now the law of Moses required that the priests, who are descendants of Levi, must collect a tithe from the rest of the people of Israel,

11.anchor: So if the priesthood of Levi, on which the law was based, could have achieved the perfection God intended, why did God need to establish a different priesthood, with a priest in the order of Melchizedek instead of the order of Levi and Aaron?

26.anchor: He is the kind of high priest we need because he is holy and blameless, unstained by sin. He has been set apart from sinners and has been given the highest place of honor in heaven.
